PLAY [webservers] *************************************************************

TASK [Gathering Facts] ********************************************************
ok: [web1.example.com]

changed: [web1.example.com]
ok: [web2.example.com]

TASK [Start nginx] ************************************************************
ok: [web1.example.com]
ok: [web2.example.com]
